title: Evaluate functions from their graph
description: Evaluate functions for specific inputs given the graph of the function.  Functions are written using function notation.

hints:
If the point $(a,b)$ is on the graph, then $f(a)=b$.

We should look for the point on the graph whose $x$-coordinate is $2$.

The point on the graph whose $x$-coordinate is $2$ is the point $(2,-2)$.

**Therefore, $f(2)=-2$.**
